stemHtml: An aircraft is flying over the Alps on a very cold winter`s day. The regional QNH is 1013 hPa. During the flight, the aircraft circles around a mountain at an altitude of its summit. What reading will the aneroid altimeter give, compared to the elevation of the summit?

options.a: A higher altitude than the elevation of the summit
options.b: The same altitude as the elevation of the summit
options.c: There is insufficient information to come to a conclusion
options.d: A lower altitude than the elevation of the summit
